_comment: Gaming short-form layout DESIGN DEFAULTS for the Σ₀ editor. These are directional parameters from widely-known PUBLIC short-form conventions (facecam in a top band, gameplay centred, captions in the lower third). They are NOT statistics scraped from specific copyrighted creators' clips (Kai Cenat / CaseOh / Jynxzi / Speed / etc.) — Lantern does not download or analyze copyrighted content. Recalibrate against first-party outcomes when those exist.

composition._note: Composition formula (public short-form conventions, NOT scraped from specific creators). Priority is absolute: gameplay is the immovable centre; the facecam is secondary and orbits the gameplay; captions are tertiary and orbit BOTH.
